purpose: Records the canonical wildfire hazard x-axis (FSim conditional flame-length bins) and the 10 curve-bearing WS_* failure units, so a downstream damage model can be checked against the SAME axis. It IS a hazard-axis + grain reference. It IS NOT a set of damage ordinates: every DR cell is WITHHELD upstream (NO_RUNTIME_CURVE) and is left blank, never fabricated.

hazard_axis.unit_note: Conditional flame-length CLASS (ft), a probability object given burning; NOT incident heat flux (kW/m^2) and NOT fireline intensity (kW/m).
hazard_axis.frequency_separation: Burn probability is a downstream FREQUENCY-layer field, not a damage ordinate.

excluded_from_curve.WS_SUPPORT_COST_ALLOCATION: allocation rule, not a failure-unit DR curve

dr_ordinates: WITHHELD_NO_RUNTIME_CURVE - every (bin x failure_unit) DR value is deliberately withheld upstream and is left blank in the companion CSV. No ordinate has been reconstructed.
